slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Mphato wa 4 - Legato la Magareng
slides.title: Go Ithuta go Baetapele
slides.lead: Kopana le baetapele ba bane ba sebete gomme o utolle mekgwa ye mebotse yeo ba ka re rutago yona.

media.alt: Diswantsho tse nne tsa mmala di eme mmogo ka fase ga letsatsi le le phadimago.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='130' width='320' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='270' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><g><circle cx='70' cy='78' r='14' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='60' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='120' cy='72' r='14' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='110' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='170' cy='78' r='14' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='160' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='220' cy='72' r='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='210' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Amogela klase ka borutho. Botsa baithuti gore lehono ba tla kopana le baetapele ba bane ba nnete ba histori. Hlalosa gore ga re ithute fela seo baetapele ba se dirilego - re ithuta mekgwa ye mebotse yeo ba e bontshitsego, go swana le toka, sebete le botho. Botsisa: ke mang moetapele yo o mo tsebago? Morutisi, mohlahli, motswadi?

slides.title: Moetapele ke eng?
slides.lead: Moetapele ke motho yo a thusago batho ba bangwe gomme a ba bontsha tsela ye botse ya go sepela ka yona.

blocks.text: **Moetapele** ke motho yo batho ba bangwe ba mo kgethago go mo latela. Baetapele ba babotse ga se fela balaodi. Ba na le taba le batho ba bangwe gomme ba leka go dira seo se lego **toka** le **se se lokilego**.

items: Baetapele ba babotse ba theeletsa ba bangwe gomme ba swara batho bohle ka go swana.
Ba na le sebete gomme ba emela seo se lokilego, le ge go le thata.
Re ka ithuta **mekgwa** ye mebotse go bona, go swana le potego, botho le kholofelo.

slides.notes: Boloka polelo e le bonolo go baithuti ba Mphato wa 4. Hlalosa lentsu 'mekgwa' ka bonolo: mekgwa ke dilo tse dibotse tseo re dumelago go tsona gomme re leka go di dira. Ngwala mantsu a sego kae a mekgwa letlapeng (toka, sebete, botho, kholofelo). Baithuti ba tla lemoga mekgwa ye go moetapele yo mongwe le yo mongwe lehono.

slides.title: Nelson Mandela
slides.lead: Mosemane wa magaeng yo a golago go etapele Afrika Borwa ka moka.

blocks.text: **Nelson Mandela** o belegwe ka 1918 motsaneng o monnyane wa Eastern Cape. Lapa la gagwe le be le mmitsa *Rolihlahla*. Bjalo ka monna o somile go dira gore Afrika Borwa e be le toka go batho **bohle**, go sa setshwe mmala wa letlalo la bona.

items: Kgale, Afrika Borwa e be e na le melao ye e sa lokago yeo e bego e swara batho ka go fapana ka mmala.
Mandela o emetse kgahlanong le melao ye e sa lokago.
O ile a tsenywa kgolegong mengwaga ye 27, eupsa ga se a ka a lahla kholofelo.

media.alt: Seswantsho se se iketlilego sa monna yo a myemyelago yo a nago le meriri ye mepududu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='82' r='34' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M56 78 a34 34 0 0 1 68 0 q-34 -22 -68 0 Z' fill='#e6e1d8'/><path d='M62 118 q28 26 56 0 v40 h-56 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa kgethollo (apartheid) ka boleta le ka bonolo go baithuti ba banyane: kgale, melao ye e sa lokago e be e aroganya batho ka mmala wa letlalo la bona gomme e be e se na toka. O se ke wa tsena ka dintlha tse boima. Lebisa tlhokomelo go boikemisetso le kholofelo ya Mandela. Mengwaga ye 27 kgolegong e bontsha kamoo a bego a na le taba ka gona.

slides.eyebrow: Seo Mandela a re rutago sona
slides.title: Tebalelo le toka
slides.lead: Ge Mandela a etswa kgolegong, o kgethile khutso go ena le pefelo.

blocks.text: Ka mehla go bonala go sa kgonege go fihlela go dirilwe.

Ka 1994 Afrika Borwa e swere dikgetho tsa yona tsa mathomo moo **yo mongwe le yo mongwe** a bego a ka bouta. Mandela e ile ya ba mopresidente wa rena wa mathomo yo a kgethilwego ka temokrasi. O kgopetse batho go **lebalela** le go soma mmogo.

items: Mokgwa: **tebalelo** - go lahla pefelo go aga khutso.
Mokgwa: **toka** - yo mongwe le yo mongwe o swanetse go swarwa ka go lekana.
Mokgwa: **kholofelo** - go dumela gore dilo di ka kaonefala.

slides.notes: Ye ke pelo ya kanegelo ya Mandela go Mphato wa 4: o be a ka galefa ka morago ga kgolego, eupsa o kgethile tebalelo le khutso. Botsisa baithuti: o kile wa lebalela mogwera neng? Go be go ekwega bjang? Kgokaganya mokgwa wo le maphelo a bona.

slides.title: Mahatma Gandhi
slides.lead: Moetapele yo a bontshitsego gore o ka emela seo se lokilego ntle le go lwa.

blocks.text: **Mohandas Gandhi** o tlile Afrika Borwa a etswa India ka 1893 go tlo soma bjalo ka ramolao. Mo o ile a swarwa ka tsela ye e sa lokago ka gobane e be e le Moindia. Se se dirile gore a phethe go lwantsha melao ye e sa lokago - eupsa ka tsela ya **khutso**.

items: Gandhi o rutile batho go ipelaetsa **ntle le dikgaruru**. O bitsa se *satyagraha*, seo se rago 'maatla a theresho'.
Batho ba latetse mohlala wa gagwe gomme ba gana go obamela melao ye e sa lokago.
Ka morago o boetse India gomme a thusa go etapela naga ya gagwe go ya tokologong. Ba bantsi ba mmitsa *Mahatma*, seo se rago 'moya o mogolo'.

media.alt: Seswantsho se bonolo se nago le digalase tsa sedikwa le patla ya go sepela.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='78' r='30' fill='#c9a37a'/><circle cx='80' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='100' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='87' y1='76' x2='93' y2='76' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M64 112 q26 22 52 0 v44 h-52 Z' fill='#f0ece3'/><line x1='128' y1='96' x2='128' y2='156' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa satyagraha ka bonolo bjalo ka 'maatla a theresho' goba 'boipelaetso bja khutso'. Kgopolo ya bohlokwa go Mphato wa 4: Gandhi o bontshitse gore o ka ba yo maatla le sebete ntle le go gobatsa motho. Ela hloko gore dikgopolo tsa khutso tsa Gandhi ka morago di hlohleleditse Mandela le baetapele ba bangwe lefaseng ka bophara.

slides.eyebrow: Seo Gandhi a re rutago sona
slides.title: Theresho le khutso
slides.lead: Gandhi o be a dumela gore selo se se maatla kudu seo o ka se dirago ke go dula o le khutso le potego.

blocks.heading: Theresho
blocks.text: Ka mehla eba potego, le ge go le thata.

blocks.heading: Khutso
blocks.text: Rarolla mathata ntle le go gobatsa ba bangwe.

blocks.heading: Sebete
blocks.text: Eba le sebete se se lekanego go emela seo se lokilego.

slides.notes: Somisa dikarata tse tharo bjalo ka dintlha tsa poledisano. Botsisa baithuti mehlala ya ka phaposing ya borutelo: re ka rarolla ngangisano ka khutso bjang sekolong? Re ka bolela theresho bjang le ge re tshogile? E boloke e le ya tiriso gomme e kgauswi le lefase la bona.

slides.title: Chief Albert Luthuli
slides.lead: Morutisi le kgosi yo a bego a etapela ka boiketlo le khutso.

blocks.text: **Albert Luthuli** e be e le morutisi wa sekolo le kgosi ya Mazulu. O ile a ba moetapele wa African National Congress (ANC), sehlopha se se bego se somela ditokelo tsa toka go Maafrika Borwa ka moka. Go swana le Gandhi, o be a dumela go boipelaetso bja **khutso**.

items: Ka 1960 o thopile **Nobel Peace Prize** (Sefoka sa Khutso sa Nobel) - sefoka se se tumilego kudu sa batho bao ba somelago khutso.
E bile motho wa mathomo wa Moafrika go thopa sefoka se.
O rutile batho go se fele pelo, go iketla le go ba le sebete.

media.alt: Mmentlele wa gauta wa sefoka sa khutso o nago le riboni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M76 40 l-18 44 h20 l12 -40 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M104 40 l18 44 h-20 l-12 -40 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='40' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='30' fill='#f0c467'/><path d='M90 92 l6 18 h19 l-15 11 6 18 -16 -11 -16 11 6 -18 -15 -11 h19 Z' fill='#b9821f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lebisa tlhokomelo go Luthuli bjalo ka moetapele wa khutso yo a hlomphshwago lefaseng ka bophara. Hlalosa Nobel Peace Prize ka bonolo: sefoka se se kgethegilego sa batho bao ba thusago go tlisa khutso. Go ba Moafrika wa mathomo go se thopa ka 1960 go bontsha gore lefase le hlomphile tsela ya gagwe ya khutso. Kgokaganya mekgwa ya gagwe le boipelaetso bja khutso bja Gandhi.

slides.title: Walter Sisulu
slides.lead: Moetapele wa bohlale le wa potego yo a hlahlilego le go thekga ba bangwe.

blocks.text: **Walter Sisulu** e be e le mogwera wa kgauswi le mothusi wa Nelson Mandela. O be a tsebega ka go ba **bohlale** le ka go fa keletso ye botse. O somile ka thata gore Maafrika Borwa ka moka a swarwe ka toka.

items: O thusitse baetapele ba bafsa, go akaretswa Mandela, go gola le go etapela.
Go swana le Mandela, o ile a romelwa kgolegong ka lebaka la go emela kgahlanong le melao ye e sa lokago.
Ga se a ka a kgaotsa go dumela go Afrika Borwa ye e nago le toka le tokologo.

media.alt: Diswantsho tse pedi di eme kgauswi, se sengwe se beile seatla legetleng la se sengwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 180' role='img'><rect width='200' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='140' width='200' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='70' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='54' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='130' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='114' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='84' y='90' width='34' height='9' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sisulu o ruta mokgwa wa potego, bohlale le go thekga ba bangwe - moetapele ga a swanela go ba motho yo a tumilego kudu gore a be bohlokwa. Hlalosa gore Sisulu o thusitse le go hlahla Mandela. Botsisa baithuti: ke mang yo a le thusago le go le thekga? Ba ka thusa le go thekga mogwera bjang?

slides.title: Mekgwa yeo baetapele ba rena ba e abelanago
slides.lead: Baetapele ba bane ba go fapana, eupsa ba na le mekgwa ye mebotse ye mentsi ya go swana.

blocks.heading: Toka
blocks.text: Mandela o be a nyaka gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe a swarwe ka go lekana.

blocks.heading: Khutso
blocks.text: Gandhi le Luthuli ba kgethile khutso, e sego dikgaruru.

blocks.heading: Sebete
blocks.text: Ka moka ba bane ba bile le sebete, le ge go be go le kotsi.

blocks.heading: Botho
blocks.text: Sisulu o thekgile le go thusa batho bao ba bego ba mo dikologile.

slides.notes: Selaete se se kopanya baetapele ba bane. Bontsha gore le ge ba phetse ka dinako le mafelo a a fapanego, ba abelane mekgwa. Botsisa baithuti gore ke mokgwa ofe wo ba naganago gore ke wa bohlokwa kudu le gore ke ka lebaka la eng. Ga go na karabo ye e fosagetsego - hlohleletsa poledisano.

slides.title: Leeto la go ralala nako

events.label: Luthuli o thopa Nobel Peace Prize
Mandela o ba mopresidente; yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ka bouta

slides.notes: Thusa baithuti go bala thelaeno ya nako ye bonolo go tloga ka la nngele go ya go la go ja. Bontsha gore baetapele ba ba phetse ka dinako tse di fapanego, gomme maphelo a bangwe ba bona a be a kopana. Ela hloko gore mengwaga ga e a hlophiwa ka tatelano ye e nepagetsego mo ka boomo - o ka botsisa baithuti go thusa go e beakanya ka tatelano ye e nepagetsego bjalo ka mosongwana o mokhutshwane.

slides.title: Go ba moetapele bophelong bja gago
slides.lead: Ga o swanela go ba yo a tumilego gore o be moetapele yo mobotse.

blocks.text: O ka bontsha mekgwa ye mebotse ye e swanago le ya baetapele ba **letsatsi le letsatsi** gae, sekolong le le bagwera ba gago.

items: Eba le **toka** - abelana gomme o fe yo mongwe le yo mongwe sebaka.
Eba le **botho** - thusa motho yo a lego bothateng.
Eba le **sebete** - emela mogwera yo a swarwago gampe.
Eba le **potego** - ka mehla bolela theresho.

media.alt: Seswantsho sa ngwana se thusa ngwana yo mongwe go emelela, se na le pelo ka godimo ga bona.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='124' width='220' height='36' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='16' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='68' y='78' width='24' height='46' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='140' cy='72' r='16' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='128' y='90' width='24' height='34' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='92' y='92' width='36' height='9' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><path d='M110 24 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 q0 12 -16 22 q-16 -10 -16 -22 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fihlisa thuto go maphelo a baithuti ka bobona. Ye ke maikemisetso a CAPS: go ithuta mekgwa go baetapele le go e somisa. Botsisa moithuti yo mongwe le yo mongwe go bolela selo se tee seo a tlago go se dira bekeng ye go bontsha mokgwa o mobotse. O ka fetosa se leboteng la 'mekgwa' la klase.

slides.eyebrow: A re lekoleng seo re ithutilego sona
slides.title: Boelela gomme o gopole
slides.lead: Araba dipotsiso tse go bontsha seo o ithutilego sona ka baetapele ba rena.

blocks.text: Lehono re kopane le baetapele ba bane ba sebete - **Nelson Mandela**, **Mahatma Gandhi**, **Chief Albert Luthuli** le **Walter Sisulu** - le mekgwa ye mebotse yeo ba re rutago yona.

blocks.question: Bolela baetapele ba babedi bao o ithutilego ka bona lehono le mokgwa o tee wo yo mongwe le yo mongwe a re rutago wona.
Gandhi le Luthuli ka bobedi ba be ba dumela go tsela e tee ye e kgethegilego ya go emela seo se lokilego. E be e le eng?
Ngwala ka mokgwa o tee wo o tswago thutong ye le kamoo o ka o bontshago sekolong bekeng ye.

slides.notes: Somisa dipotsiso tse tharo bjalo ka mosongwana wa go ngwala goba poledisano ya klase. Potsiso ya 1 e lekola go gopola, potsiso ya 2 e lekola kwesiso (boipelaetso bja khutso / go hloka dikgaruru), gomme potsiso ya 3 e kgopela baithuti go somisa mokgwa maphelong a bona, seo se sepelelanago le nepiso ya CAPS. Reta boiteko gomme o gopotse baithuti gore mang le mang a ka ba moetapele yo mobotse ka go phela mekgwa ye mebotse.
